title: Peruvian-Style Keto Chicken
description: A flavorful and spicy dish inspired by Peruvian cuisine, with a focus on keto-friendly ingredients.
instructions: In a small bowl, mix together sour cream, flaky sea salt, aji amarillo pepper, garlic, chili powder, paprika, and black pepper.
Season the chicken breasts with La Brasa chicken seasoning.
Heat the avocado oil in an oven-safe skillet over medium-high heat. Sear the chicken breasts for 2-3 minutes per side.
Transfer the skillet to the preheated oven and bake for 15-20 minutes, or until the chicken is cooked through.
Brush the sour cream mixture on top of the chicken breasts during the last 5 minutes of cooking.
Let the chicken rest for 5 minutes before slicing and serving.
Serve with your choice of side dishes, such as a salad or roasted vegetables.
